message:
feat: add GA4 mobile traffic monitor to catch silent mobile crashes (#5642)

Nightly workflow (8:15 UTC) queries GA4 for mobile session percentage
by day. Creates a GitHub issue if mobile drops below 5% for 3+
consecutive days — the pattern that indicates a mobile-specific crash
preventing analytics from loading.

Context: A Sidebar render loop on March 20, 2026 killed mobile for
19 days undetected because the crash prevented GA4 from reporting.
Auto-closes issue when mobile traffic recovers.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
